name: ASRock X670E PG LIGHTNING ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6600+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 -DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN
